description: The viewing platform by the Qiantang River offers stunning views of the Qiantang River and the Hangzhou city skyline.
The original production area of Longjing Tea, one of China's top ten famous teas, where visitors can experience tea culture and taste authentic Longjing Tea.
A renowned Chinese seal carving society with a century-long history and cultural heritage.
A UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of China's most famous lake attractions, known for its 'One Lake, Two Pagodas, Three Causeways, and Ten Scenes.'
A serene ancient temple nestled among tea plantations and bamboo forests, offering a tranquil environment ideal for meditation and relaxation.

attraction_name: West Lake Longjing Shifeng Mountain Tea Frying Center
description: A traditional tea plantation and tea-making experience site located in Longjing Village, where visitors can enjoy tea field scenery and taste authentic West Lake Longjing Tea.
A lake causeway built by Bai Juyi during his tenure as Hangzhou governor, most beautiful in spring when peach blossoms and willow catkins fill the air.
A large-scale outdoor performance integrating Hangzhou's culture and modern art, staged at night on West Lake.
Showcasing traditional Hangzhou handicrafts and modern arts and crafts, including silk, embroidery, carving, and various other craft categories.
The unique geological landscape in front of Lingyin Temple features abundant stone carvings and statues.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on Xiaoyingzhou Island, named for the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling moons.
A scenic avenue on the west side of West Lake, quieter compared to Su Causeway, ideal for leisurely walks and relaxation.
A well-preserved historic district featuring typical Jiangnan water town architecture with a strong sense of local life.
A large musical fountain located in Lakeside Park No. 3, offering spectacular nighttime performances synchronized with music.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with unique architectural design, perfect for art enthusiasts to visit.

attraction_name: Autumn Moon over the Calm Lake Viewing Spot
description: One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a tranquil and picturesque spot for moon viewing and lake sightseeing.
The most important comprehensive museum in Zhejiang Province, housing a rich collection of historical artifacts and art treasures, situated on the scenic Solitary Hill.
The foremost of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, famous for its willow-lined beauty in spring.
